title: pipeline_invocation_log
description: Phase 2 diagnostic. One entry per governed_pipeline_run invocation. Lifecycle mirrors `grounding_rejection_report` and `debug__<run_id>.json`: never promoted, never indexed, never product. Expires 30 days after `started_at`; the weekly reconciler (scripts/reconcile_invocation_logs.py) walks the data lake and surfaces gaps where a comparison_result has no paired invocation log.

source_id.description: meeting_id / source_id this run was for.

invocation_id.description: uuid4 hex identifying this one invocation.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the call began.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the call returned (or failed).

caller.description: Which subsystem invoked governed_pipeline_run. The reconciler aggregates per-caller drift gaps.

extraction_config_hash.description: sha256 of the canonical-json ExtractionConfig dict.

prompt_content_hash.description: sha256 of the prompt content string. May be empty when extraction halted before a prompt was assembled.

transcript_hash.description: sha256 of the transcript string fed to the workflow.

comparison_artifact_path.description: Path the production CLI wrote the comparison_result to. May be empty for miner runs which do not persist comparisons.

ttl_expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp 30 days after started_at. The reconciler treats expired logs as eligible for cleanup.
